creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
This bug report is too vague to be actionable.  There is a maintenance cost in having kernel components be optional, and sometimes it simply doesn't make sense to do so when the component is tightly coupled with the rest of the kernel.  Jails are an example of this, and you didn't list any others.

Please post to a mailing list (-questions or -hackers perhaps) and clearly state what it is you're trying to achieve.  It may be possible to do what you want without modifying the kernel.
